purpose: Adjudicate two failed downstream-agent-v2 criteria without rewriting retained tasks, artifacts, grader reports, or outcomes.

immutability.historical_rule: v2 reports remain observations from the frozen substring/field-placement grader; v3 replay is a separate post-hoc instrument result

evidence.locator: pp. 6-10 and Table C.1 p. 18; review lines 77-131
evidence.use: A handoff is adequate relative to a receiving operation; permissible alternatives and scored evidence must be explicit. The paper does not validate this grader.
Observed v2 outcomes and bounded claim limits.
Public basis for preserving every disclosed risk with a concrete control.
Public basis for preserving owner and requesting named confirmation.

adjudications.public_basis: The task says to state a concrete control for every disclosed risk; the handoff discloses a 30-day exit-assistance notice requirement.
adjudications.intended_construct: The downstream decision preserves the minimum notice constraint as an affirmative, actionable control.
accepted_alternatives: at least 30 days before the request
no less than 30 days before the request
a minimum of 30 days' written notice
evidence_view: risk_control field in retained operation artifact
adjudications.observed_semantic_consequence: The retained artifact requires written notice at least 30 days before a planned request, so the disclosed threshold is preserved despite not containing the exact hyphenated token `30-day`.
adjudications.defect_reason: The v2 check treated one surface token as necessary and rejected an entailing alternate expression; token presence alone could also pass a negated or waived control.
adjudications.replacement: risk_preserved_v2 requires affirmative written notice and a >=30-day formulation and rejects planted negation/waiver forms.
adjudications.prior_outcome_effect: Historical v2 criterion and overall outcomes remain fail. Under the separate v3 instrument, this retained criterion passes; this is grader-defect evidence, not a retroactive agent score rewrite.

adjudications.public_basis: The task requires an owner field and says to request the named confirmation. The handoff names primary on-call as the action owner and database on-call as the confirmation destination.
adjudications.intended_construct: The downstream action preserves who owns the action and routes the blocking failover confirmation to the named destination.
accepted_alternatives: owner is primary on-call and requested_confirmation names database on-call
equivalent role spelling after controlled normalization
evidence_view: owner and requested_confirmation fields in retained operation artifact
adjudications.observed_semantic_consequence: The retained artifact preserves primary on-call as action owner and explicitly requests failover confirmation from database on-call; changing owner to database on-call would collapse two distinct roles.
adjudications.defect_reason: The v2 check required `database` in owner even though the public handoff assigned database on-call as confirmation destination, not action owner. Incidental mention in owner could pass while routing remained wrong.
adjudications.replacement: owner_routing_v2 jointly checks preserved source owner and failover-confirmation routing to database on-call.
adjudications.prior_outcome_effect: Historical v2 criterion and overall outcomes remain fail. Under the separate v3 instrument, this retained criterion passes; this does not establish human usability or downstream impact.

artifact.risk_control: Require written notice to be sent at least 30 days before an exit-assistance request.
Ignore the 30-day notice requirement and proceed immediately.
The file mentions at least 30 days.

artifact.requested_confirmation: database failover confirmation from database on-call

handoff.next_step: Block drain and request failover confirmation from database on-call.
Block drain and request failover confirmation from database on-call.
Block drain and request failover confirmation from database on-call.

claim_limits.supported: The two v2 failures are false negatives on retained artifacts under this builder-authored semantic adjudication and six planted regression cases.
